Simulation & Electromagnetics Ansys Motor-CAD FEA EV Powertrain

Design and Simulation of a PMSM using Finite Element Analysis
(in Ansys Motor-CAD)

FEA magnetic flux density plot & full stator winding layout ” Ansys Motor-CAD

Designed and simulated a Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motor (PMSM) for electric vehicle applications using finite element analysis in Ansys Motor-CAD. Beginning with theoretical traction and drivetrain calculations, the motor dimensions, winding configuration, and key design parameters were derived and translated into a complete electromagnetic motor model.

The design was validated through finite element analysis in Ansys Motor-CAD, where characteristics such as torque-speed behaviour, back EMF, efficiency, saturation, and overall operating performance were analysed under realistic EV operating conditions.

Tool
Ansys Motor-CAD
Method
Finite Element Analysis
Application
Electric Vehicle (RWD)

Project Poster

Page 1 ” Introduction & Design Click to enlarge
Page 2 ” Results & Conclusion Click to enlarge

This project was created by Devansh Kumar, Nikhil Mohan, Akhil Abu Koshy, Anirudh Ramakrishnan, and Aashi Kaur as part of the Electrical Machines and Drives course at VIT Chennai. The work explores the practical application of finite element methods in electric motor design ” bridging theoretical calculations with simulation-driven validation.
